mode_availability_rules.foot_horse_cart: Valid only on continuous land routes inside black-border land and outside red or scribbled exclusion belts.
mode_availability_rules.ship: Valid for coast, Brineland, North/South Swirling Sea, Edict Ocean, ports, and the Cosmouth floating-city band.
mode_availability_rules.fantasy_aircraft: Can cross water and exclusion belts, but remains rare and not a mass-denizen baseline.

major_reading_rules: V30 names and high-tier identities remain the authority unless a node is explicitly marked as a supplement or conservative extrapolation.
Land calculations are clipped to the interiors of the user-supplied black polity borders. Outside those borders is water.
The scribbled Shelk–Sheresh radioactive frigid mountain massif is uninhabitable and blocks direct surface settlement spread through its core.
Additional user-marked red exclusion pockets are treated as uninhabitable for density calculation and new settlement placement.
House Cosmouth retains the only offshore settlement exception, and that exception is limited to a nearshore floating-city band close to the Cosmouth coastline.
Direct-canon city internals remain clustered where they belong; density balancing is achieved primarily by redistributing supplement anchors and adding conservative outer settlements.

scale_assumptions.Soreheim Alliance: Approximately North America plus Chile and Argentina, but only within the western black-border landmasses.
scale_assumptions.Sheresh Communes and the Principalities: Approximately Asia minus Russia, but only within the eastern outlined polity borders.
scale_assumptions.Psanan: Approximately Alaska in footprint, with greatly reduced effective habitable surface because of vertical volcanic relief.
scale_assumptions.ocean_note: The opposite hemisphere remains predominantly water. On the visible hemisphere, any off-border space is also treated as water unless canon explicitly names a water macroregion or the nearshore Cosmouth floating-city exception.
